Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets break down the standard Hire to Retire process 1 Post Job Ad 2 Screen Candidates 3 Conduct Interviews 4 Make Hiring Decision 5 Onboard Employee 6 Add to Payroll 7 Close Case Standard order Post Screen Interview Decide Onboard Payroll Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means after Screening you can Make Hiring Decision and Conduct Interviews in parallel or in any order since its a partial order But typically you Interview before making a Hiring Decision Here Decide and Interview are both directly preceded by Screen and there is no edge between Interview and Decide So Decide could happen before Interview or in parallel

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets trace Model 1 carefully Post Screen Screen Decide Screen Interview Decide Onboard Payroll Close Interview is only constrained to be after Screen It could be executed after Close

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This fundamentally breaks the hiring logic as interviews are the primary assessment tool

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait Post Screen and Post Interview This means Screen and Interview are in parallel both directly after Post Typically you Screen before you Interview Here they are parallel This is an anomaly Also Screen has no outgoing edges So Screen could happen after Close

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Onboard is in a loop can be repeated Payroll is in an XOR with skip can be skipped

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop on onboarding could represent iterative onboarding steps eg IT setup HR orientation department training The XOR on payroll could represent non payrolled hires contractors volunteers

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The most critical aspect of the hiring process is that the hiring decision must be informed by the interviews

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 breaks this causal link allowing decisions to be made solely based on screening or before interviews Model 2 maintains the Interview Decide link

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: While Model 2 has anomalies with Screen the core decision making and post hiring flow Onboard Payroll Close remains logically intact and sequentially ordered The loop and skip in Model 2 can be justified as realistic business variations whereas Model 1s anomalies represent a fundamental breakdown of process integrity
